title: Ramana Botta
text:
I’m a robotics engineer working on autonomous systems and electric mobility at Boson Motors. I’m interested in perception, controls, and the messy problems that show up when robots meet the real world.
Outside of work, I write about robotics, hardware, and the occasional side project on the blog, and keep looser, less polished thoughts in notes.
